//: CompanyBrain on Railway. This file configures ONE service (the API) from
the repo Dockerfile. Railway is per-service, so provision the rest in the
1. New Project > Deploy from Repo (this railway.json builds the API).
2. Add a Postgres database (New > Database > PostgreSQL). Railway Postgres
supports pgvector; the API migration enables the `vector` extension on
3. On the API service set: DATABASE_URL=${{Postgres.DATABASE_URL}},
to 3333 and is auto-detected from EXPOSE.
4. Add a second service for the dashboard using apps/web/Dockerfile and set
NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL to the API service's public URL.
